channel.title: Nick Spears - Robtics Software Developer
channel.description: Recent content on Nick Spears - Robtics Software Developer

item.title: Download original template
item.description: /content/home/downloads/download1.md A simple, nice-looking call to action box. Boxing is about respect. getting it for yourself, and taking it away from the other guy. no, this is mount everest.

item.title: Download HUGO template
item.description: /content/home/downloads/download2.md Another simple, nice-looking call to action box. Boxing is about respect. getting it for yourself, and taking it away from the other guy. no, this is mount everest.
